channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STYLEBAAZA] Baazar Style Retail: CARE Ratings reports Nil deviation in IPO fund use for Q4 FY26
item.description:
Baazar Style Retail Ltd has submitted the Monitoring Agency Report from CARE Ratings Limited for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The report, filed pursuant to Regulation 32 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, confirms "Nil" deviation from the stated objects for which the ₹185 crore Initial Public Offering (IPO) proceeds were raised. CARE Ratings clarified that their report offers an objective view based on issuer-provided information and does not involve an audit or independent verification.

  • Baazar Style Retail filed its IPO fund utilization report.
  • CARE Ratings confirmed "Nil" deviation from IPO objectives.
  • Report covers IPO proceeds of ₹185 crore for Q4 FY26.
  • This compliance report is mandated by SEBI Regulation 32.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Baazar Style Retail Ltd | Category: Corporate Governance

item.title: [NOBPOL] Noble Polymers approves ₹12.87 Cr preferential issue, change in control
item.description:
Noble Polymers Ltd's Committee of Independent Directors has recommended a preferential issue of 22,76,400 equity shares at ₹5 each, totaling ₹1.13 crore, to Mr. Mahesh Alabhai Odedra and Mr. Hiren Rambhai Odedra. These individuals will be classified as promoters. Additionally, the company will allot 2,34,75,735 convertible warrants at ₹5 each, aggregating to ₹11.73 crore, to various proposed allottees. The equity share allotment, representing 26% of the emerging voting capital, triggers an Open Offer under SEBI Takeover Regulations, leading to a change in control and management. The issue price of ₹5 per share/warrant was determined based on a valuation report and includes a control premium.

  • Noble Polymers to issue 22.76 lakh equity shares for ₹1.13 Cr.
  • Company to allot 2.34 Cr convertible warrants for ₹11.73 Cr.
  • Preferential issue leads to change in control and management.
  • New promoters to acquire 26% stake, triggering an Open Offer.
  • Issue price of ₹5 per share/warrant includes a control premium.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Noble Polymers Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [CTCL] Captain Technocast: Erroneous Press Release Upload
item.description:
Captain Technocast Ltd. reported that a press release belonging to Captain Polyplast Limited, dated 14th May, 2026, was inadvertently uploaded under Captain Technocast's login. The release concerned the launch of a new manufacturing facility at Ahmedabad by Captain Polyplast. Stakeholders are requested to disregard the release concerning Captain Technocast and consider it for Captain Polyplast.

  • Captain Technocast mistakenly uploaded Captain Polyplast's press release.
  • The press release relates to Captain Polyplast's new facility launch.
  • Stakeholders should ignore the release under Captain Technocast's profile.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Captain Technocast Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [WSIND] W.S. Industries Appoints Internal and Tax Auditors
item.description:
W.S. Industries (India) Ltd has re-appointed M/s. R. Subramanian and Company LLP as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-2027 and appointed M/s. Sudarshan & Ranganathan as Tax Auditors for FY 2025-2026. The board also approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from the Statutory Auditors.

  • M/s. R. Subramanian & Company LLP re-appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-2027.
  • M/s. Sudarshan & Ranganathan appointed as Tax Auditors for FY 2025-2026.
  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 approved.
  • Statutory Auditors issued unmodified opinion on financial statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: W.S.INDUSTRIES (INDIA) LTD.-$ | Category: Auditor

item.title: [INDIANHUME] Indian Hume Pipe Recommends ₹5 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Indian Hume Pipe Company Ltd's board recommends a total dividend of ₹5 per equity share (250%) for FY26, comprising a normal dividend of ₹2 (100%) and a special dividend of ₹3 (150%) to commemorate the company's 100th anniversary, subject to shareholder approval. The record date for determining dividend entitlement is set for July 17, 2026. The 100th Annual General Meeting will be held on August 3, 2026, via video conferencing. The board also approved the re-appointment of Ms. Anima B. Kapadia, who retires by rotation.

  • Indian Hume Pipe recommends a total dividend of ₹5 per share (250%) for FY26.
  • Dividend includes a special ₹3 dividend to celebrate the company's 100th anniversary.
  • Record date for dividend entitlement is fixed as July 17, 2026.
  • 100th AGM scheduled for August 3, 2026, via video conferencing.
  • Ms. Anima B. Kapadia is proposed for re-appointment as Non-Executive Non-Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN HUME PIPE CO.LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [INNOVANA] Innovana Thinklabs Board Meeting on May 20, 2026
item.description:
Innovana Thinklabs Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, reopening post-results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Innovana Thinklabs Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DATAPATTNS] Data Patterns: FY26 Results, ₹10 Dividend Recommended
item.description:
Data Patterns (India) Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. A final dividend of ₹10 per equity share has been recommended for FY26, subject to shareholder approval at the AGM scheduled for July 31, 2026. The dividend, if approved, will be paid on or before August 29, 2026. The board meeting was held on May 14, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 6:15 p.m. Auditors M/s. Deloitte Haskins & Sells issued an unmodified opinion on the financial statements.

  • Audited FY26 financial results approved by the board.
  • Final dividend of ₹10 per share recommended.
  • AGM scheduled for July 31, 2026, via video conference.
  • Dividend payment, if approved, by August 29, 2026.
  • Auditors issued an unmodified opinion on financial statements.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Data Patterns (India) Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [PITTIENG] Pitti Engineering: Final Dividend ₹2.50 & ₹290 Cr Capex Approved
item.description:
Pitti Engineering Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹2.50 per equity share (50%) subject to member approval. The board also approved a capital expenditure of ₹290 crores for setting up a greenfield casting and machined components facility, expected to be completed in three years and funded through internal accruals and lease finance. The new facility will increase the company's total installed casting capacity to 36,000 MT per annum.

  • Approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹2.50 per share (50%).
  • Approved ₹290 crores capex for a new greenfield casting facility.
  • New facility to increase casting capacity to 36,000 MT per annum.
  • Project to be completed in 3 years, funded via internal accruals and lease finance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pitti Engineering Ltd-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DEEPIND] Deep Industries Approves FY26 Results, ₹2.50 Dividend
item.description:
Deep Industries Ltd's board approved audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹2.50 per share (50% on face value of ₹5), subject to shareholder approval. M/s. Manubhai & Shah LLP was re-appointed as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27. The board meeting concluded at 6:05 PM on May 14, 2026.

  • Approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Recommended a final dividend of ₹2.50 per share (50% on face value of ₹5).
  • Re-appointed M/s. Manubhai & Shah LLP as Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27.
  • Auditors, M/s Mahendra N. Shah & Co., issued an unmodified opinion on the financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Deep Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DMART] Avenue Supermarts: Shyam Gupta Resigns as Head - Apparels
item.description:
Mr. Shyam Gupta has resigned from his position as Head - Apparels, Senior Management Personnel of Avenue Supermarts Ltd, effective August 12, 2026. The resignation was tendered on May 14, 2026, due to personal reasons. The company has provided details as required under SEBI regulations, including the reason for the change and the date of cessation.

  • Shyam Gupta resigned as Head - Apparels at Avenue Supermarts Ltd.
  • Resignation tendered on May 14, 2026, due to personal reasons.
  • Last working date will be August 12, 2026.
  • Company disclosed information as per SEBI regulations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Avenue Supermarts Ltd | Category: Management Change
